nasb.text: You have made him for a little while lower than the angels; You have crowned him with glory and honor, And have appointed him over the works of Your hands;

esv.text: You made him for a little while lower than the angels; you have crowned him with glory and honor,

cnv.text: 你使他暫時成了比天使卑微， 卻賜給他榮耀尊貴作冠冕，

ccb.text: 你使他暂时比天使低微一点， 赐他荣耀和尊贵作冠冕， 派他管理你所造的一切，

csbs.text: 你使他暂时比天使低微    ； 你赐他荣耀和尊贵为冠冕；
